title: Howlin' Highway - NoLimits Coaster
description: This is my 4th NoLimits coaster I have uploaded, and it is my first floorless coaster. It has 5 inversions - 2 vertical loops, a corkscrew, a barrel roll, and some other nearly-upside-down banked turn, which I consider an inversion... The station is the top of the first drop. So, I had to finish the ride with a very steep lift hill, which may not be realistic...
